summary:
## ⚡ Quick Summary
A New York City-based digital agency that builds custom websites, branding, and marketing solutions for businesses of all sizes, with a focus on UX/UI and strategic development.

**Company:** WD23 / webdesigner23.com  
**Core Services:** Web design & development, ecommerce, branding, marketing (SEO, SMM, PPC), hosting with 24/7/365 support.  
**Target Clientele:** Startups to large enterprises, across small business and mid-market.  
**Key Differentiator:** Fully in-house team, transparent/educational partnership, 110% uptime guarantee on AWS/Google Cloud hosting.  
**Pricing Model:** Project-based with budget tiers from $500 up to $250k+ (range selected on contact form).  
**Geographic Focus:** New York, NY (office at 251 West 30th Street, New York, NY 10001).  
**Contact Info:** Phone (212) 392-5437, Email hello@webdesigner23.com.
